content: string_upcase  Table of contents Prototype: string_upcase(data) Return type: string Description: Returns data in uppercase. Arguments: data : string - Input string - in the range: .* Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { vars : " upcase " string => string_upcase ( "abc" ); # will contain "ABC" reports : "upcased abc: $(upcase) " ; } Output: code R: upcased abc: ABC History: Introduced in CFEngine 3.6 See also: string_downcase() .
